world.title: World Aquatics to Trial New Concepts and Add Opportunities for Athletes
world.description: Following a meeting of the World Aquatics Bureau, new concepts are to be trialled that will increase opportunities available for athletes at future World Aquatics swimming events. Applicable at both the World Aquatics Swimming World Cup Silk Road Tour 2026 and the World Aquatics Swimming Championships (25m) 2026 in Beijing, the number of lanes used in the semi-finals and finals for some events will be increased from eight to ten. Meanwhile, a system of wild cards will also enable Member Federations to field up to three additional swimmers at the World Aquatics Swimming Championships (25m) 2026.

world.title: UG professor calls for responsible behavior from Ghanaians during the rainy season to prevent malaria
world.description: Lecturer at the University of Ghana, Legon Professor Yaw Asare Afrane has called on Ghanaians to act responsibly during the rainy season by keeping their surroundings clean to help prevent malaria and other mosquito borne diseases.
